step_rationale: TGF-β signaling in SMCs; regulates inflammation, fibrosis, and cap stability.
mechanism: SMAD3 is a CAD-risk effector in smooth muscle cells that controls TGF-β-mediated inflammation, matrix remodeling, and fibrous-cap stability.

references.title: Coronary artery disease-associated variants regulate vascular smooth muscle cell gene expression.
Genetic Regulatory Mechanisms of Smooth Muscle Cells Map to Coronary Artery Disease Risk Loci.
Integrative functional genomics identifies regulatory mechanisms at coronary artery disease loci.
